ai.error: OPENAI_API_KEY or LLM_MODEL is not configured

{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "Brumbelow", "type": "finder"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/230265269?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brumbelow/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brumbelow/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brumbelow/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brumbelow/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Brumbelow", "id": 230265269, "login": "Brumbelow", "node_id": "U_kgDODbmRtQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brumbelow/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brumbelow/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brumbelow/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brumbelow/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brumbelow/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brumbelow", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45266", "cvss": {"score": 3.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": [], "cwes": [], "description": "### Impact

A low-privileged user can force other user's microphones to be muted in calls when no High-performance Backend is installed.

### Patches

It is recommended that the Nextcloud Talk is upgraded to 21.1.10, 22.0.11 or 23.0.3

### Workarounds

* Disable the Talk app
* Install the Nextcloud Talk High-performance Backend

### References

<!-- Link to the main/master PR only -->

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3636758)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/spreed/pull/17577)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
* Customers: Open a support ticket at [portal.nextcloud.com](https://portal.nextcloud.com)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x75r-65hm-cw35", "html_url": "https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/security/advisories/GHSA-x75r-65hm-cw35", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x75r-65hm-cw35"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45266"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-12T08:15:30Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/84044328?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DorraJaouad", "id": 84044328, "login": "DorraJaouad", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg0MDQ0MzI4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "low", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Unauthorized force-mute from missing permission check when using internal signaling", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T08:15:30Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nextcloud/security-advisories/security-advisories/GHSA-x75r-65hm-cw35", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "nextcloud", "name": "Talk"}, "patched_versions": "21.1.10, 22.0.11, 23.0.3", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 21.1.10, < 22.0.11, < 23.0.3 "}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Unauthorized force-mute from missing permission check when using internal signaling
